demographics.living_situation: at home, a parent is present and helping make the call

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My leg feels like it is exploding inside the cast, and the pain is a million times worse than when I actually broke the bone! The strong tablets they gave me aren't touching it.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: I got a cast put on my broken shin at a clinic this morning and over the last few hours the pain has become unbearable and keeps getting worse, even after taking my painkillers.

symptom_narrative.onset: over the last 4 hours, since a cast was put on my broken shin earlier today
symptom_narrative.duration: about 4 hours and steadily getting worse
symptom_narrative.character: a deep, aching, tight, bursting feeling inside the leg, like it is being squeezed
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: far worse than when I first broke the bone — I can't stop moving and crying with it
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: deep inside the lower leg, under and around the cast
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing helps — the strong tablets did nothing at all
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: any time I try to move or wiggle my toes the pain becomes absolutely unbearable
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: pins and needles have started over the top of my foot, and my toes feel harder to move
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: no, this is the first time I have had a cast
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't rest or lie still, I'm writhing on the couch, I can't do anything except focus on the pain

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: broke my shin bone (tibia) earlier today and had it put in a fiberglass cast at a local clinic

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: oxycodone (strong pain tablets they prescribed today)
current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: one 10mg tablet, took it about an hour ago

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: at home with a parent present who is very worried and helping to describe things

objective_data_offered.value: the part of the leg above the cast looks shiny, tight and swollen, and the skin looks pale
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: described over video by a distressed patient/parent, not examined

objective_data_offered.value: he is writhing and crying in agony and cannot keep still; he says the pain is nothing like the original break
pins and needles over the top of the foot, and the toes feel weaker and harder to move than before
the cast is rigid fiberglass and feels very tight; it was applied earlier today
